name: CAVCO INDUSTRIES, INC.
business: Cavco designs and produces factory-built homes distributed through independent and company-owned retailers, planned community operators, and residential developers. The company also manufactures park model RVs, vacation cabins, and factory-built commercial structures, and offers financing and insurance services through its subsidiaries.

exposures.sentence: we design and produce factory-built homes primarily distributed through a network of independent and Company-owned retailers, planned community operators and residential developers.
Our insurance subsidiary, Standard Casualty Company, provides property and casualty insurance primarily to owners of manufactured homes.

Our finance subsidiary, CountryPlace Acceptance Corp., is an approved FNMA and FHLMC seller/servicer and a GNMA mortgage-backed securities issuer that offers conforming mortgages, non-conforming mortgages and home-only loans to purchasers of factory-built homes.
